slides.title: Cover Canvas
slides.speaker_note: Open cover canvas for component-first dark analytics deck authoring.

slides.title: Content Canvas
slides.speaker_note: General content canvas. Replace the guide area with page-specific component composition.

slides.title: Comparison Canvas
slides.speaker_note: Open comparison canvas for two or three entities, options, markets, products, or capabilities.

slides.title: Chart Evidence Canvas
slides.speaker_note: Open canvas for one dominant chart, image, table, timeline, or source-backed evidence anchor plus interpretation.

slides.title: Closing Canvas
slides.speaker_note: Low-density closing canvas for final contact, decision request, or next-step page.
